content:
Hey everyone! 👋

A few points we wanted to bring up:  

1️⃣ New roles were introduced to <id:customize>.  You can now receive a special role for some essential channels. In the future, we will use this instead of pinging everyone.  

**Please remember to pick up your "Language" Role!! **  

2️⃣ The <#1436766905628098632>  channel is now live.  This channel was done by some of our Community Interpreters and Mythag University (I apologize for forgetting who assisted, please shoot me a DM so I can properly credit you 🙏). Shoutout to <@88644018673582080>  for generating the final draft.

3️⃣ Special thanks to <@248551659771265026> for creating the server banner and our realm roles ❤️.

***We also wanted to say a huge thank you to all of you who have been helping out the new gamers joining our server!

It's awesome to see so many of you stepping up, answering questions, offering tips, and making sure everyone feels welcome. Your help makes a massive difference in making this a great place for new players to learn the ropes and get settled in.*** ❤️ 🙏 

If you wish to see anything else on the server, drop by <#1385040039448412170>  channel 👍

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

大家好！👋

 有几点需要说明：

1️⃣ <id:customize> 中新增了角色。现在您可以获得特定角色，以便访问一些重要渠道。未来，我们将使用此功能，而不是向所有人发送通知。

2️⃣ <#1436766905628098632> 频道现已上线。本频道由我们的一些社区翻译和 Mythag 大学共同制作（很抱歉我忘记了所有协助者，请私信我以便我正确地署名🙏）。特别感谢 <@88644018673582080> 生成最终稿。

3️⃣ 特别感谢 <@248551659771265026> 制作了服务器横幅和超棒的领域角色❤️。

***我们还要衷心感谢所有帮助新玩家加入我们服务器的各位！***

***看到这么多人挺身而出，回答问题，提供建议，并确保每个人都感到宾至如归，真是太棒了！你们的帮助对营造一个新玩家学习入门、快速融入游戏的好环境至关重要。*** ❤️ 🙏

如果您想了解服务器上的其他内容，请访问 <#1385040039448412170> 频道 👍
